name: Najdi Arabic
notes: Najdi Arabic (نجدي). Central Arabia, including Riyadh. VERY CONSERVATIVE: ث /θ/, ذ /ð/, ظ /ðˤ/ ALL PRESERVED (only strong urban speech merges them). ق → /ɡ/ (traditional Najdi Bedouin) or /q/ (Riyadh urban/formal). ج → /dʒ/ (city) or /ɡ/ (Bedouin). No k → /tʃ/ shift (unlike coastal Gulf). Ingham (1994) is the primary linguistic reference. Prestige within Saudi Arabia.
